title: AnalysisTaskFragment
description: AnalysisTaskFragment: Fragment to be put on a LoadCombination to help you control the analysis task type to use in GSA and for which stage the combination should be run.

Stage.description: The stage number for the combination to be run on.

ResidualForce.description: Allowed residual Force for convergence, only used for Non-linear analysis.

ResidualMoment.description: Allowed residual Moment for convergence, only used for Non-linear analysis.

BeamSlendernessEffect.description: Reduce beam stiffness when in compression, only used for Non-linear analysis.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
